# Awesome-List Submission Content

Ready-to-use PR text for each awesome-list. Copy the relevant block when opening the PR.

---

## awesome-fsharp

**Repo:** github.com/fsprojects/awesome-fsharp
**Section:** Web Frameworks / JavaScript Interop

**List entry to add:**

```markdown
- [NextFs](https://github.com/Neftedollar/Next.fs) - Fable bindings for the Next.js App Router: components, navigation, metadata, server actions, fonts, and route helpers in idiomatic F#.
```

**PR title:** `Add NextFs — Fable bindings for Next.js App Router`

**PR body:**

```
NextFs is a thin Fable binding layer for writing Next.js App Router applications in F#.

It covers next/link, next/image, next/script, next/font, next/navigation, next/headers,
next/server, next/cache, metadata, and more — staying close to native Next.js concepts
so existing Next.js knowledge transfers directly.

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/NextFs
- CI: passing, includes a real `next build` + E2E smoke
- License: MIT
- Code of Conduct: present
```

## Community Announcement Template

Use this as a base for F# Slack, Discord, Reddit (r/fsharp, r/dotnet), and X/Twitter.

```
NextFs 1.0 — write Next.js App Router apps in F# with Fable

- next/link, next/image, next/script, next/font, next/navigation
- next/headers, next/server, next/cache, metadata, OG images
- Route handlers, server actions, middleware config
- [<NextFsEntry>] attribute → zero handwritten JS wrappers

https://github.com/Neftedollar/Next.fs
dotnet add package NextFs

#fsharp #nextjs #fable #dotnet
```
